product.name: AutoStream
product.tagline: AI-Powered Video Automation for Content Creators
product.description: AutoStream is a world-class SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators. It helps creators produce social-ready videos faster with AI-powered editing, captioning, and formatting.

plans.name: Basic Plan
plans.support: Email support (business hours only, Mon-Fri 9AM-6PM EST)

plans.name: Pro Plan
plans.support: 24/7 priority support (live chat + email, under 2 hour response)

refund.title: Refund Policy
details: Full refund available within the first 7 days of subscription.
No refunds are issued after 7 days from the date of purchase.
Refund requests must be submitted via the support portal.

support.title: Support Policy
details: Basic Plan users receive email support during business hours (Mon-Fri, 9 AM - 6 PM EST).
Pro Plan users receive 24/7 live chat and priority email support.
Average response time: Basic (24 hours), Pro (under 2 hours).

cancellation.title: Cancellation Policy
details: Users can cancel their subscription at any time from the account settings.
Access continues until the end of the current billing cycle.

faq.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro mid-cycle?
faq.answer: Yes. When you upgrade, the remaining days on your Basic plan are prorated and applied as credit toward your Pro subscription.

faq.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports direct publishing to YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, and Facebook. You can also download edited videos locally.

faq.question: Is there a free trial?
faq.answer: AutoStream offers a 7-day free trial of the Pro plan for new users. No credit card required to start.

faq.question: Do you offer team or enterprise plans?
faq.answer: The Pro plan includes team collaboration for up to 5 seats. For larger teams or custom enterprise needs, contact sales@autostream.io.
